VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW filtered the OT claims header records to distinguish between capitated payments and payments 
for services. Capitated payments are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS variable called 
CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to '2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' (Other Services 
claim). These capitated payment claims are captured in MMLEADS in the 
MDCD_OT_MC_PREMIUM_USE variable. 

The Medicaid payment information corresponding to
